results.prompt: I don’t trust the text extraction from the Austrian form PDF. Can you still figure out what the document is asking for and give me a clean checklist of the fields I would need to fill?
results.answerPreview:
Yes. The PDF is an Austrian **“Antrag auf Erteilung eines Aufenthaltstitels”** — application for a residence permit — plus a statistics annex on **school education and occupation**.

I found the structure clearly enough to make a checklist. I would treat this as a **form-filling checklist**, not as legal advice.

## Clean checklist of fields to fill

### 0. Before the numbered fields
- [ ] Attach/passport-style EU photo: **35 mm x 45 mm**
- [ ] Handwritten signature where requested
- [ ] Use date format: **DD.MM.YYYY**
- [ ] Do **not** fill sections marked **“Nur von der Behörde auszufüllen”**...
